Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limit for data stores when filtering by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to access larger amounts of data more efficiently, improving game functionality.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of requests a player can make to the data store for ordered lists, filtered by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing server load and ensuring smoother gameplay for players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limits for reading data stores with a universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data retrieval efficiency, leading to faster game loading times.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store read requests per player based on the universe they are in.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance by preventing too many data requests from slowing down the game.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Changes how data requests are limited based on universe filters.
Added_Other.purpose: Optimizes data storage and retrieval for smoother gameplay.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data removal requests a player can make in a universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and stability by preventing excessive data requests from individual players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Added_Other.purpose: Enhances game performance by ensuring data is saved efficiently without overwhelming the system.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that players' actions are recorded in the correct order without overloading the system.

Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limits for data storage based on game universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data management for developers, allowing better organization of player data.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on how many data store items can be listed per player when filtering by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Enables better access to player-specific data, enhancing gameplay experiences.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on data store read requests per universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures consistent data access and performance across games.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data store requests a player can make based on the universe they are in.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by preventing excessive data requests from players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes the fixed limit on requests for data store removal operations when filtering by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows developers to manage data more flexibly across different game universes.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on how many data store requests a player can make based on the game universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to have more flexibility in saving and loading their game data.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on write requests to the data store for each universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that players' data is saved reliably without exceeding limits.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on the number of write requests a single player can make to the data store.
Added_Other.purpose: Prevents any single player from overwhelming the system, ensuring fair data access.

Changed_Other.name: DFFlagHttpUrlStats
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tracks and collects statistics on HTTP requests made by the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers understand how their games use web resources, improving reliability and performance.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores the current version of the codebase as a dynamic string.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and features in the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Modifies how dynamic strings are managed with timestamps.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures accurate and timely updates for in-game messages.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a faster method to retrieve version information from the game's code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances the speed of updates and version checks for smoother gameplay.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings for faster performance.
Changed_Other.purpose: Reduces lag in games by speeding up the handling of time-related data.

Removed_Other.name: DFFlagHttpUrlStats_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Enables tracking of HTTP URL statistics for better analysis.
Removed_Other.purpose: Helps developers understand how players interact with web links, improving game features.
